data.content: Implementation review approved. All 4 acceptance criteria met: (1) Refine Scope button renders in BulkEditControls when onRefineScope prop provided, (2) handleRefineScope fires parallel refineBeatScope() calls via Promise.allSettled with summary toasts, (3) resolveRepoForBeat fallback to activeRepo handles offline-created knots, (4) source-code verification tests pass (3 tests in bulk-refine-scope.test.ts, 5 tests in use-beat-actions-refine-scope.test.ts). Quality gates all green: lint clean, tsc clean, 2412 tests passing.
